PC          Instruction         Machine Code
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
0x0000		addi s0,s0,4        00000000010001000000010000010011
0x0004		add s1,zero,zero    00000000000000000000010010110011
0x0008		addi s1,zero,1      00000000000100000000010010010011
0x000c		add s2,s1,s1        00000000100101001000100100110011
0x0010		add s3,s2,s1        00000000100110010000100110110011
0x0014		addi s4,zero,-10    11111111011000000000101000010011
0x0018		sw s1,0(s0)         00000000100101000010000000100011
0x001c		sw s2,4(s0)         00000001001001000010001000100011
0x0020		sw s3,-4(s0)        11111111001101000010111000100011
0x0024		sw s4,8(s0)         00000001010001000010010000100011
0x0028		beq zero,zero,0     00000000000000000000000001100011
